Quantum Computing for Hydrology and Water Resources

HydroQuantum

HydroQuantum is a research initiative within Clemson University’s HHR Lab focused on quantum computing and quantum machine learning applications in hydrology and water resources.

View Publications Explore Projects

Publication

HydroQuantum

Mostafa Saberian, Nima Zafarmomen, Adarsha Neupane, Krishna Panthi, and Vidya Samadi

Environmental Modelling & Software, 2025

Quantum-driven Python package for hydrological simulation.

Quantum computing package for irrigation demand assessment.
